sn2.14:1.1: Ekamantaṁ ṭhito kho nandano devaputto bhagavantaṁ gāthāya ajjhabhāsi:
sn2.14:2.2: Kathaṁvidhaṁ sīlavantaṁ vadanti,Kathaṁvidhaṁ paññavantaṁ vadanti;Kathaṁvidho dukkhamaticca iriyati,Kathaṁvidhaṁ devatā pūjayantī"ti.
sn2.14:3.1: "Yo sīlavā paññavā bhāvitatto,Samāhito jhanarato satīmā;Sabbassa sokā vigatā pahīnā,Khīṇāsavo antimadehadhārī.
sn2.14:4.1: Tathāvidhaṁ sīlavantaṁ vadanti,Tathāvidhaṁ paññavantaṁ vadanti;Tathāvidho dukkhamaticca iriyati,Tathāvidhaṁ devatā pūjayantī"ti.
